title: Battle of Bastion
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Battle |prev=[[Battle of Ebaq]]''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' |conc=[[Battle of Muunilinst (Yuuzhan Vong War)|Battle of Muunilinst]] |next=[[Battle of Bescane]]''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' |image= |name=Battle of Bastion |conflict=[[Yuuzhan Vong War]] |date=[[28 ABY/Legends|28 ABY]] |place=[[Sartinaynian system]] |result=*[[Yuuzhan Vong]] victory **Yuuzhan Vong occupied Bastion and cause it near-destruction *Evacuation of the [[Imperial Remnant]] from [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]] |side1=[[Yuuzhan Vong empire]] |side2=*Imperial Remnant *[[New Jedi Order]] |side3= |side4= |commanders1=[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] [[B'shith Vorrik]] |commanders2=[[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]] |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |forces1= *At least 15 [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] **''[[Kur-hashan]]'' *Thousands of [[grutchin]]s *[[Yorik-et|Coralskippers]] |forces2=*[[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyers]] **[[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']] **''[[Superior]]'' *[[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighters]] *[[Frigate/Legends|Frigates]] *''[[Jade Shadow]]'' *[[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] |forces3= |forces4= |casual1=*Most of the Vong attack force |casual2=*Heavy **''Superior'' destroyed **''Chimaera'' seriously damaged |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|They took us by surprise. We were holding our own to begin with. Then the Vong pulled back. We thought we had them on the run, but they were just getting out of the way. [sic] Once they'd punched a hole in our defenses, the Yuuzhan Vong came back into the fray. We've been on the back foot ever since.|[[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Gilad Pellaeon/Legends|Gilad Pellaeon]]|}} The '''Battle of Bastion''' was the large surprise attack on the [[Imperial Remnant]] by the invading extragalactic [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. With the support of the [[New Jedi Order]], the Remnant was able to evacuate the Imperial capital of [[Bastion/Legends|Bastion]] before its near-destruction by the Yuuzhan Yong. ==The Battle== {{Quote|Bastion is going to take a pummeling, no matter what we do.''"
"''It looks to me like they're pulling out. Falling back to regroup elsewhere. Look. They're civilian ships. They've evacuated Bastion.|[[Mara Jade Skywalker]] and [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|}} While aware that a Yuuzhan Vong force was approaching [[Imperial Space|their space]], [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial spies]] reported that the attack was aimed at the [[Hand of Thrawn]] at [[Nirauan/Legends|Nirauan]]. When Vorrik's forces instead arrived in the [[Sartinaynian system|Bastion system]], the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] was caught completely off guard as the Yuuzhan Vong destroyed planetary defenses with ease. Despite this, the Starfleet was able to hold its own at first, until the Yuuzhan Vong pulled back. What the Remnant expected to be a retreat was soon revealed to be the launch of a swarm of thousands of [[grutchin]]s. The fleet responded to the grutchins with appalling disorganization; only Pellaeon's own [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]], the [[Chimaera/Legends|''Chimaera'']], responded with appropriate efficiency and effectiveness on short notice. The resulting losses forced Pellaeon to order the evacuation of Bastion. As separated elements of the fleet fought and attempted to regroup, a small [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] expedition that included [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]] and [[Mara Jade Skywalker]], arrived aboard the ''[[Jade Shadow]]''. After assessing the situation, they jumped toward the [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] where a force composed of the ''Chimaera'', the [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|Imperial Star Destroyer]] ''[[Superior]]'', and their support craft were pinned against [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] gravity mass shadow by a powerful enemy contingent. The Jedi provided Pellaeon with information on the location of the enemy's [[yammosk]] before departing for [[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]]. Pellaeon dispatched [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]] to deal with the yammosk carrier and then attempted to break out of the gas giant's mass shadow. The ''Superior'' was critically damaged and Pellaeon ordered its evacuation as it fell into the depths of the planet. The ''Chimaera'' had also taken considerable damage by the time a [[Yorik-et|coralskipper]] rammed its bridge. The suicide run nearly killed Pellaeon, but a junior officer pulled the Grand Admiral from the bridge and loaded him aboard a medical frigate carrying survivors from ''Superior''. Under the cover of wreckage from the dying Star Destroyer, and the brave sacrifices made by a dozen of the ''Superior's'' TIE Fighter [[TIE pilot|pilots]], the frigate was able to escape for [[Yaga Minor/Legends|Yaga Minor]]. Toward the end of the battle, a Yuuzhan Vong [[slaveship]] arrived over Bastion and began to harvest Imperial citizens who had been unable to escape in time. ==Aftermath== {{Quote|Anyone with half a brain should have seen the flaw in the reasoning that, if we hadn't been attacked yet, we were unlikely to be attacked at all.|[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Arien Yage]]|}} While caught off guard, the efforts of the Imperial Navy enabled most of Bastion's population to escape in time. Upon arrival in the [[Yaga Minor system/Legends|Yaga Minor system]], the shuttle's pilot, a Human male named [[Vitor Reige]], ferried Pellaeon to the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Frigate/Legends|frigate]] [[Widowmaker (frigate)|''Widowmaker'']]. The [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral's]] life was saved due thanks to surgery from the [[Chadra-Fan/Legends|Chadra-Fan]] [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] healer [[Tekli]]. Pellaeon's survival restored the Imperial chain of command. Despite the evacuation of their commander, the crew of the ''Chimaera'' successfully managed to retreat from Bastion and afterward limped into Yaga Minor. Now provoked, the Imperial Remnant chose to ally with the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]] against the [[Yuuzhan Vong empire]]. ==Appearances== *''[[The New Jedi Order: Force Heretic I: Remnant]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Legacy of the Force: Revelation]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[Geonosis and the Outer Rim Worlds]]'' *{{FactFile|125|PEL 1-4|Gilad Pellaeon}} {{Imo}} *''[[The New Essential Chronology]]'' *{{CSWECite|multiple}} *''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{YuuzhanVongWarNav}} {{Interlang |de=Schlacht von Bastion |es=Batalla de Bastion }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Bastion, Battle of}} [[Category:Battles of Bastion]] [[Category:Battles of the Yuuzhan Vong War]] [[Category:Evacuations]]
